One container contains 60 capsules | 30 days

Magnesium Glycinate: Supports muscle relaxation and reduces tiredness and fatigue.

Ashwagandha: Traditionally used to help manage stress and promote relaxation.

GABA: A neurotransmitter that helps calm the nervous system and improve sleep quality.

Chamomile: Known for its calming effects and ability to promote relaxation.

L-Theanine: An amino acid that promotes relaxation without drowsiness.

Lemon Balm Powder: Traditionally used to reduce anxiety and promote sleep.

Zinc: Supports overall health and immune function.

Safflower Extract: Rich in natural antioxidants.

L-Serine: Supports brain function and overall well-being.

Escolzia Powder: Traditionally used for its calming and sleep-promoting properties.

Vitamin B6: Supports energy production and overall health.

Consistency is key for a supplement routine.

Save 20% on each order.

Receive a metal container first, then refill bags monthly.

• Save 20%
  • Hassle-free shipments directly to your door
  • Cancel or pause any time
  • Ships from Sweden

How to use?

Take 2 capsules in the evening, about 30-60 minutes before bedtime. Consistent use is recommended for the best results.

Food Supplement/Kosttillskott/Kosttillskudd

EN: 60 capsules, 30 doses/days
SE: 60 kapslar, 30 doser/dagar

Recommended daily dose/Rekommenderad daglig dos

EN: 2 capsules per day.
SE: 2 kapslar per dag.

Produkten bör inte användas som ersättning för en varierad kost. Den rekommenderade dagliga dosen bör inte överskridas. Förvaras oåtkomligt för små barn. Kosttillskott bör inte användas som ett alternativ till en balanserad och varierad kost samt en hälsosam livsstil.

settings.title: Tired of sleeping for 8 hours and not having energy?
settings.description:
Up to 67% of people struggle with sleep.
Most miss out on deep, restorative rest.

BKM Tranquil includes ingredients designed to help you achieve deep and REM sleep, the sleep that makes you wake up energized.

settings.name: Magnesium Glycinate
settings.function: Supports immune function, bone health, and calcium absorption. Essential for overall wellness and mood regulation.
settings.clinical_trial_1: Magnesium supplementation beneficially affects depression in adults with depressive disorder: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized clinical trials" (Moabedi M, et al., 2023, PMID: 38817505)
settings.clinical_trial_2: Oral magnesium supplementation for insomnia in older adults: a Systematic Review & Meta-Analysis (BMC Complementary Medicine and Therapies, 2021)
settings.clinical_trial_3: Examining the Effects of Supplemental Magnesium on Self-Reported Anxiety and Sleep Quality: A Systematic Review" (Rawji A, et al., 2024, PMID: 38817505)

settings.name: Ashwagandha
settings.function: Traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, ashwagandha is known for its adaptogenic properties. It helps the body maintain balance during periods of emotional or physical stress.
settings.clinical_trial_1: Efficacy of Ashwagandha (Withania somnifera) in improving sleep quality among healthy adults: A systematic review and meta-analysis" (Cheah KL, et al., 2021, PMID: 34411883)
settings.clinical_trial_2: An investigation into the stress-relieving and pharmacological actions of an ashwagandha (Withania somnifera) extract: A randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study (Lopresti AL, et al., 2019, PMID: 31517876)
settings.clinical_trial_3:
Effect of Ashwagandha (Withania somnifera) extract on sleep and stress in healthy elderly participants: A double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled study
(Kelgane SB, et al., 2020, PMID: 32930044)

settings.name: GABA
settings.function: GABA is a naturally occurring amino acid that functions as a neurotransmitter. It plays a role in the nervous system by contributing to a calm and relaxed state.
settings.clinical_trial_1: The effects of oral administration of gamma-aminobutyric acid (GABA) on improving sleep quality: a systematic review and meta-analysis (Hepsomali P, et al., 2023, PMID: 37855538)
settings.clinical_trial_2: Effects of Oral Gamma-Aminobutyric Acid (GABA) Administration on Stress and Sleep in Humans: A Systematic Review (Hepsomali P, et al., 2020, PMID: 33203292)
settings.clinical_trial_3: Relaxation and immunity enhancement effects of gamma-aminobutyric acid (GABA) administration in humans (Abdou AM, et al., 2006, PMID: 16971751)

settings.name: Chamomile
settings.function: Chamomile has a long history of traditional use to support relaxation and well-being. It is often consumed before bedtime as part of a calming evening routine.
settings.clinical_trial_1: Preliminary examination of the efficacy and safety of a standardized chamomile extract for chronic primary insomnia: A randomized placebo-controlled pilot study (Zick SM, et al., 2011, PMID: 21939549)
settings.clinical_trial_2: Effectiveness of Chamomile Tea on Sleep Quality in Elderly People: A Randomized Controlled Trial (Adib-Hajbaghery M, et al., 2017, PMID: 29122237)
settings.clinical_trial_3: Long-term chamomile (Matricaria chamomilla L.) treatment for generalized anxiety disorder: A randomized clinical trial (Mao JJ, et al., 2016, PMID: 27912875)

settings.name: L-theanine
settings.function: L-theanine is an amino acid naturally found in green tea. It is known for its traditional use in promoting a calm and focused state without causing drowsiness.
settings.clinical_trial_1: L-theanine reduces stress and improves relaxation in healthy adults: A randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study (Hidese S, et al., 2019, PMID: 31623400)
settings.clinical_trial_2: The effects of L-theanine supplementation on sleep quality in boys with ADHD: A randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled clinical trial (Lyon MR, et al., 2011, PMID: 22214254)
settings.clinical_trial_3: Anti-stress effect of theanine on students during pharmacy practice: A randomized controlled trial (Unno K, et al., 2013, PMID: 23458739)

settings.name: Lemon balm powder
settings.function: Lemon balm has been traditionally used to support relaxation and emotional well-being. Commonly included in calming herbal preparations.
settings.clinical_trial_1: Pilot trial of Melissa officinalis L. leaf extract in the treatment of volunteers suffering from mild-to-moderate anxiety disorders and sleep disturbances (Cases J, et al., 2011, PMID: 22433297)
settings.clinical_trial_2: Attenuation of laboratory-induced stress in humans after acute administration of Melissa officinalis (Lemon Balm) (Kennedy DO, et al., 2004, PMID: 15272110)
settings.clinical_trial_3: A combination of valerian and lemon balm is effective in the treatment of restlessness and dyssomnia in children (Müller SF, et al., 2006, PMID: 16444660)

settings.name: Safflower extract
settings.function: A natural plant extract from Carthamus tinctorius, providing conjugated linoleic acid (CLA) and antioxidants.

settings.name: Zinc
settings.function: Zinc contributes to the normal function of the immune system and helps protect cells from oxidative stress. It also plays a role in normal cognitive function.
settings.clinical_trial_1: Zinc supplementation improves sleep quality and reduces inflammatory markers in adults: a randomized controlled trial (Gholipour Baradari A, et al., 2018, PMID: 29981697)
settings.clinical_trial_2: Zinc supplementation reduces anxiety and improves mood in young women: a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study (Sawada T, et al., 2010, PMID: 20689416)
settings.clinical_trial_3: Effects of zinc supplementation on sleep quality and duration in elderly individuals with poor sleep: a randomized controlled trial (Cherasse Y, et al., 2019, PMID: 31375243)

settings.name: L-Serine
settings.function: L-serine is a non-essential amino acid that occurs naturally in the body. It plays a structural role in the formation of proteins and cell membranes.
settings.clinical_trial_1: L-serine metabolic regulation and host respiratory homeostasis (PMID: 40078876)
settings.clinical_trial_2: L-serine synthesis via the phosphorylated pathway in humans (PMID: 32594192)

settings.name: Escolzia powder
settings.function: Also known as California poppy, this plant has been traditionally used in herbal preparations to support relaxation and assist with sleep onset.
settings.clinical_trial_1: California poppy (Eschscholzia californica), the Papaveraceae golden girl model organism for evodevo and specialized metabolism (PMID: 36938015)
settings.clinical_trial_2: Alkaloids in commercial preparations of California poppy - Quantification, intestinal permeability and microbiota interactions (PMID: 37673017)

settings.name: Vitamin B6
settings.function: Vitamin B6 contributes to the normal functioning of the nervous system, helps reduce tiredness and fatigue, and supports normal psychological function.
settings.clinical_trial_1: Vitamin B6 in Health and Disease (PMID: 34579110)

settings.heading: 11 active Ingredients
settings.description: 11 carefully selected ingredients, each chosen for their unique role in promoting deep, restorative sleep and helping your body unwind from daily stress.

settings.title: 1. Before sleep
settings.text: Tranquil can reduce stress and anxiety. Ashwagandha and GABA can lower cortisol, while L-theanine and magnesium regulate calming neurotransmitters, ensuring a smooth transition into sleep.

settings.title: 2. Falling asleep
settings.text: The ingredients work together to calm the mind, reduce stress, and promote relaxation. Ashwagandha and L-theanine can ease anxiety, GABA reduces neural activity, and magnesium regulates melatonin, all contributing to falling asleep easier.

settings.title: 3. During sleep
settings.text: We focus on helping you achieve restorative sleep. Tranquil's ingredients support easier transitions into REM and deep sleep, helping you wake up energized.

settings.title: 4. Long Term effects
settings.text: Ashwagandha and GABA can enhance long-term sleep quality and support a balanced sleep-wake cycle, while L-theanine and magnesium reduce sleep disturbances, which can help to achieve restorative sleep.

settings.title: Created by Li, Swedish champion in free diving
settings.description: The Nordic free dive champion Li Karlsén is the co-founder, maker, and user of all BKM supplements. Her history and experiences laid the foundation for BKM.

settings.title: How long does it take to feel the effects of BKM Tranquil?
settings.text: Many users notice a difference within the first couple of days of use. However, some ingredients provide their best results when taken consistently over time. For optimal benefits, we recommend using Tranquil daily for at least 2 weeks.

settings.title: Can I split the capsule?
settings.text: Yes, you can split the capsule. Simply open the capsule and mix the contents with your preferred food or beverage.

settings.title: Heading
settings.text: Use this text block to discuss some commonly asked questions like shipping and returns, sizing, warranties, or product and company details.

settings.title: Can I take the supplement if I use medication?
settings.text: These supplements often work well with medications but could sometimes cause interactions. It is important to consult with your healthcare provider before use.

settings.title: Can I take the supplement if pregnant or breastfeeding?
settings.text: It is not recommended for children and pregnant or breastfeeding women to take this supplement. Please consult with your healthcare provider before use.

settings.title: Does Tranquil contain melatonin?
settings.text:
No!

BKM Tranquil does not contain melatonin. We focus on promoting relaxation and improving the quality of sleep using natural ingredients
